task_goal: Improve repeatable handling of notification badge does not clear after inbox is read: The unread notification badge stays visible after the inbox items are marked read, making the UI state stale.

failures: Issue was not reproducible before the fix
Fix was not verified after the change
Change scope exceeded the allowed boundary
Fix does not match the stated root cause

decision.reason: Rollback because one or more hard checks failed

notes.winner_pattern: The unread-count selector may depend on stale cached state or miss a read-mutation invalidation step.
notes.loser_pattern: A broad cache reset could hide the bug but cause flicker or break other notification counts.
